title: As a shopper, I want to browse the product catalogue so that I can find items to purchase

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper visits the shop homepage
acceptance_criteria.then: they see a grid of products showing name, price, thumbnail image, and stock status

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper is on the catalogue page
acceptance_criteria.then: only products in that category are shown and the URL updates to reflect the filter

acceptance_criteria.given: a shopper is on the catalogue page
acceptance_criteria.when: they sort by price low to high
acceptance_criteria.then: products are reordered with the lowest price first

acceptance_criteria.given: a product is out of stock
acceptance_criteria.then: it shows an Out of Stock badge and the Add to Cart button is disabled

acceptance_criteria.when: the shopper reaches the bottom of the page
acceptance_criteria.then: the next 20 products load automatically without a full page reload

non_functional_requirements.performance: Catalogue page loads in under 1.5 seconds at P95 with 100 products
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: Product grid is navigable by keyboard. Each product card has a descriptive aria-label.
non_functional_requirements.security: No authentication required — catalogue is public

definition_of_done: All AC have passing integration tests
